docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,549.50 FILED BY DENIAN, ARAM AS TO DEFENDANT CITIBROKERS REAL ESTATE, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-12-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DENIAN, ARAM AS TO DEFENDANT CITIBROKERS REAL ESTATE, INC

REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 03/27/2025. SC-100 PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER TO GO TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT MAILED TO DEFENDANT. (RETURN TO SENDER NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDREESED UNABLE TO FORWARD SORT IN MANUAL ONLY NO AUTOMATION)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SERVICE FEE SERVED APR-15-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITIBROKERS REAL ESTATE, INC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JUSTIN SISCO FILED BY DEFENDANT CITIBROKERS REAL ESTATE, INC

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ARAM DENIAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITIBROKERS REAL EATATE, INC. IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
